caption: A video sequence features a montage of news-style visuals. A man wearing a dark kufi cap appears in a close-up shot, positioned against a blurred background. Overlaid graphics include large, translucent blue numbers "39" and "43," as well as technical film-strip motifs with timestamps and codes like "5005-E," "EPP," and "UJI." A horizontal ticker tape scrolls across the screen containing the text "L News PLUS POLITICS" and "PLUS POLITICS," alongside various numerical markers such as "100-6" and "RSS--." The montage transitions through various fragments of footage, including small thumbnails of people in white clothing and outdoor settings. The scene eventually shifts to a stylized, blue-toned abstract graphic featuring a bright white, curved shape resembling a wing or a logo, surrounded by digital streaks and lens flare effects.
